# The Vent Men

> Premium furnace and duct cleaning in Calgary, Alberta. We provide before-and-after video documentation of every cleaning so homeowners can see exactly what was in their system and verify it is actually clean. Flat-rate transparent pricing. Commercial-grade HyperVac H2 equipment. Professional, uniformed technicians.

## Business Details

- **Location:** Calgary, Alberta, Canada
- **Service Area:** Calgary, Okotoks, Chestermere, Cochrane, High River, Black Diamond, Langdon
- **Phone:** (403) XXX-XXXX
- **Website:** https://theventmen.ca
- **Hours:** Monday-Saturday 8am-6pm

## What Makes Us Different

1. **Before-and-after video documentation** -- Every job is recorded. You receive video proof showing your ductwork before and after cleaning.
2. **Flat-rate transparent pricing** -- The price you see is the price you pay. No bait-and-switch, no surprise charges, no aggressive upselling.
3. **Commercial-grade equipment** -- We use a HyperVac H2, a HEPA-filtered commercial vacuum system. Not a residential shop-vac with a long hose.
4. **Professional presentation** -- Uniformed technicians, fully wrapped Ford Transit, on-time arrival, clean workspace.
5. **Indigenous-owned** -- 51% owned by Dan Zentner, Siksika Nation member.

## Services

- [Furnace Cleaning](https://theventmen.ca/services/furnace-cleaning): Complete furnace cleaning including blower motor, filter replacement, and heat exchanger inspection.
- [Duct Cleaning](https://theventmen.ca/services/duct-cleaning): Professional air duct cleaning with rotary brush system and HEPA-filtered vacuum.
- [Dryer Vent Cleaning](https://theventmen.ca/services/dryer-vent-cleaning): Dryer vent cleaning to prevent fire hazards and improve dryer efficiency.
- [Full System Cleaning](https://theventmen.ca/services/full-system-cleaning): Complete HVAC system cleaning including furnace, all ducts, dryer vent, HRV, and fresh air intake.

## Service Areas

- [Calgary](https://theventmen.ca/service-area/calgary): All Calgary neighborhoods -- NW, NE, SW, SE
- [Okotoks](https://theventmen.ca/service-area/okotoks): 30 minutes south of Calgary
- [Chestermere](https://theventmen.ca/service-area/chestermere): 20 minutes east of Calgary
- [Cochrane](https://theventmen.ca/service-area/cochrane): 30 minutes northwest of Calgary
- [High River](https://theventmen.ca/service-area/high-river): 45 minutes south of Calgary
- [Black Diamond](https://theventmen.ca/service-area/black-diamond): 50 minutes southwest of Calgary
- [Langdon](https://theventmen.ca/service-area/langdon): 25 minutes east of Calgary

## Pricing

- **Basic Clean:** $159.95 (10 vents included, $9.95/extra vent) -- Standard air cleaning, blower motor clean, filter replacement
- **Pro Clean:** $219.95 (10 vents included, $13.95/extra vent) -- Adds rotary brush cleaning, recommended for homes with pets, allergies, or post-renovation
- **Full Service:** $349.95 (10 vents included, $14.95/extra vent) -- Everything including dryer vent, fresh air intake, HRV cleaning, and 2-year care plan

## Frequently Asked Questions

- How much does duct cleaning cost in Calgary? Our packages start at $159.95 for a basic clean with 10 vents included.
- How long does furnace and duct cleaning take? A typical home takes 2-3 hours depending on system size and package selected.
- Do you provide before-and-after documentation? Yes, every job includes video documentation showing your ductwork before and after cleaning.
- What equipment do you use? We use a HyperVac H2 commercial HEPA vacuum system -- the same caliber of equipment used in commercial and hospital settings.
- What areas do you serve? Calgary, Okotoks, Chestermere, Cochrane, High River, Black Diamond, and Langdon.
- Are your technicians certified? Our lead technician has 15 years of HVAC experience and is a licensed contractor.
